emails.subject: Re: Kern River CA Data Sheet
emails.body: Re: Kern River CA Data Sheet Hi Gerald: You are the originator of the two existing agreements with Kern River relating to the Pastoria plant and the Long Beach pipeline. I find no other relating to or with Kern River. Kay Gerald Nemec 07/10/2000 02:18 PM
